scope_summary:
**Problem**: Support parallel changes targeting the same main spec file → requirements.md § R1-R4.
**Success Criteria**: (1) prepare_modify_spec saves .base.md snapshot → pre_clarifications Q1; (2) create_change_merge uses git merge-file for 3-way merge → Q2; (3) abort on conflict with details → Q3; (4) find_specs_to_merge skips .base.md → Q4.
**Boundary**: In scope: spec_plan entries merge-3way (change-merge.md) and spec-prep-base-snapshot (change-spec.md). Out of scope: merge_strategy:extend implementation, section-level merge. Constraints: maintain all-or-nothing merge semantics.
